---
title: atmos vendor config delete
sidebar_label: delete
sidebar_class_name: command
id: delete
description: Delete a raw value from vendor.yaml by dot-notation path.
---
import Intro from '@site/src/components/Intro'
import CastPlayer from '@site/src/components/CastPlayer'

<Intro>
Delete a raw value from `vendor.yaml` using an arbitrary dot-notation path, preserving
the rest of the file's comments, anchors, and formatting. There is no flat/component-name
alias for `delete` — use this command directly.
</Intro>

<CastPlayer title="atmos vendor config delete --help" src="/casts/screengrabs/atmos-vendor-config-delete--help.cast" static chrome />

## Usage

```shell
atmos vendor config delete <path> [--file <manifest>]
```

The `del` and `unset` aliases are also accepted.

## Examples

```shell
atmos vendor config delete spec.sources[0].tags
```

## Arguments

<dl>
  <dt>`<path>` (required)</dt>
  <dd>Dot-notation path into the vendor manifest to delete (e.g. `spec.sources[0].tags`).</dd>
</dl>

## Flags

<dl>
  <dt>`--file` (string, default `./vendor.yaml`)</dt>
  <dd>The vendor manifest file to edit.</dd>
</dl>
